reviews.comment:
Fue muy mala la atención, no tenían café, ni medialunas, pedí un sándwiches de jamón y queso tostado tardaron un montón y se les quemo, soy socio del ACA hace años y esto nunca me paso en otras estaciones

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. They didn't have coffee or croissants. I ordered a toasted ham and cheese sandwich, it took ages, and they burned it. I've been an ACA member for years, and this has never happened to me at other stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXN3ZxNlVREAE
